proposal.working_title: AI Automation Beyond ChatGPT: How to Turn Tools Into Workflows That Replace Manual Work
proposal.one_line_angle: Most SMBs bought ChatGPT but still execute the same manual workflows; FirstMovers shows how to layer routing, action, and audit on top of the LLM so the work actually moves.
outline_bullets: Why 73% of SMBs Bought a ChatGPT License and Still Run Their Operations by Hand
The Four-Layer AI Automation Stack: Capture, Route, Act, and Audit
Picking the First Workflow to Automate Without Breaking Your Team or Your Compliance Posture
